title: Phase 2 Structured Extraction Failure — Root Cause
rootCause: Phase 2 'schema' exists only in the prompt text. The OpenAI API call uses response_format: { type: 'json_object' } with no json_schema enforcement. Legacy unit_price/total remain valid output paths in the prompt (explicit escape hatch + 7 legacy positive examples). GPT satisfies extraction with legacy-only JSON — a valid response per current contract.

A_gpt_ignoring_optional_fields.note: Symptom of unconstrained schema — model is not 'ignoring' required fields because none are required

B_schema_allows_legacy_only.evidence: Prompt JSON example includes unit_price/total; line 52 legacy fallback; no property-level enforcement

C_prompt_ambiguity.evidence: 7 legacy examples vs 1 structured-only; qty=1=total rule conflicts with discounted structured extraction

D_validation_schema_issue.evidence: callOpenAiJson sends only json_object; no strict json_schema; no post-parse rejection of legacy-only items

filesAndFunctions.role: Sends json_object only — no structured field enforcement
Documents dual schema; permits legacy-only output
Downstream — correctly handles null structured input (not root cause)

firstFailurePoint.reason: Request does not constrain output shape; model free to emit legacy fields

recommendedMinimalFix.summary: Add Pass-C-specific strict JSON Schema to the OpenAI call; remove unit_price/total from item properties

steps.change: Pass response_format with type json_schema, strict: true, item properties: name, quantity, unit, gross_unit_price, discount_pct, line_total_net only (all in required array, nullable via type: [number, null])
steps.why: Forces model to emit structured keys; legacy path no longer valid JSON per schema

steps.change: Add optional responseFormat param to callOpenAiJson OR inline fetch in extractTableItemsFromImage
steps.why: Other passes (date, footer) should keep json_object

steps.change: Remove unit_price/total from prompt JSON example + update positive examples to structured-only
steps.why: Aligns prompt with enforced schema; reduces model confusion

recommendedMinimalFix.smallestSingleChange: In extractTableItemsFromImage, replace generic callOpenAiJson with a call that passes response_format: { type: 'json_schema', json_schema: { name: 'invoice_items', strict: true, schema: { ... } } } omitting unit_price and total from item.properties
recommendedMinimalFix.notRecommendedAsSufficientAlone: Prompt-only changes without json_schema enforcement — model already has clear structured instructions and still returns legacy

relatedPriorWork.conclusion: Downstream pipeline works when structured fields present; failure is upstream at GPT request
